captions.figure-0a: The shared sixteen-stage grammar entrance for Book I and the complete PHI OS architecture.
captions.figure-1a: Integrates the formation of difference, constraint, structure, connection, region and network.
captions.figure-1b: Shows the structural basis of direction, position, coordinate and navigation precision.
captions.figure-2a: Shows how Reality becomes an experienced world through projection, compression, meaning and collective layers.
captions.figure-3a: Shows how Reality moves from entrance through grammar position, core question, capability selection and driver priority into coordinate, motion, activation, Runtime processing and Reality state.
captions.figure-3b: Shows how a five-dimensional Runtime coordinate forms a current state through motion architecture and Reality activation, then evolves through temporal closure, legacy retention and a new cycle.
captions.figure-3c: Shows state, result, feedback, reconfiguration and the next Runtime cycle.
captions.figure-4a: Shows how the Reality Initialization State enters a human carrier.
captions.figure-4b: Shows sensory, cognitive, neural, physiological and environmental configuration.
captions.figure-4c: Shows carrier organization, stability, maintenance, recovery, drift and failure.
captions.figure-4d: Integrates Runtime media, initialization and configuration, Reality input, biological operation, carrier stability, adaptation, maintenance, recovery, drift and failure into human Runtime continuity.
captions.figure-5a: Shows how Reality is selected and stabilized to form a style of experience.
captions.figure-5b: Shows how experience forms expression through cognition, compression, threshold and medium.
captions.figure-5c: Shows how expression forms intention, decision, responsibility and commitment.
captions.figure-5d: Shows how action settles, compresses, drifts and reconfigures to form identity continuity.
captions.figure-5e: Integrates the carrier, experience, expression, agency and identity engines.
